reviews.review_description: When I played it was so dad with the baby shark but still 5 stars

reviews.review_title: Say no to shark fin soup🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈
reviews.review_description: My guy the game me feel so sad i love sharks and this pulling the heart strings of the baby hammerhead(named it nemo) staring at its dinner mom corpse felt very upsetting i was saying sorry to dead sharks in game because i know the horrors of it in the real world RESPECT FOR SHARKS🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈🦈

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing!!

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: Bro i cant do nothing in the game what a pointless game
Am i supposed to know every thing about the game before playing!?!? add tutorial. And its just identifying sharks as far as i know
I havent played yet, but i have an idea for post gameplay, so maybe you guys could add so that you can like play with the sharks or something

I love this game and the combat. I like how you cab sneak up on them and knock them out. The only bad thing is that it's too short and I wish it was longer. But I heard that you are working on the game and making it longer and better. To whoever reads this, I deeply recommend you play this game it is very unique👍

developer_response.body:
Hey ins4n3_kurdd!
THANK YOU! I wish it was longer too! I think what I love is how people like yourself want more, and I take that feedback seriously on my next experience :)

- Tejas

reviews.review_description:
I had an ok experience.
          The camera was always shaking, and as someone who has never gotten motion sick I felt nauseous after playing it.
         The combat was weak, I wish there was physical contact to the NPCs, and speaking of the NPCs I could just walk right past them.
          Now I understand this is just a free demo but I could have been better with a little more effort. But I still had a fun time playing it. I'm looking forward to the full version.

developer_response.body:
Hey Waffalgamer!
I love this feedback. Thanks so much for playing, and I definitely get how this game could use more work.

Fun fact, I made this app almost 5 years ago for Quest 1, so much of the experience is dated. Regardless, I love your thoughts, and I'll take your feedback seriously on my next experience called TOPPLE!

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: Such a good game love the combat and that you sneak behind and knock them out. Only bad thing is its short but from another review i heard you were making a larger and better game i am really excited for that one but if you see this and read it all this is an amazing game and thank you for making it 😁

developer_response.body:
Hey Darwin2413!

Thank you so much for playing!!! I really appreciate you leaving a great review with the feedback that it's a bit short :)

I'm currently working on a new game called Domino World! Just sent you a DM in case you would like free access to that new game!

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: Super Trawler Nets 🐬 🐳 🦈 are a disaster. Sealife 🐟 🐠 not seafood. No Pot 🦞 🦐

Short, but fun! I really like the part where you beat up the bad guys, i love the ocean and all sea life and this was super fun. If you would like a short story about rescuing sharks to play with your VR headset then this is the game for you!!!! Keep up the good work and have a great day!!!!!!!🌊🐳🦈🦑

developer_response.body:
I appreciate you leaving a review! I love ocean life too!! Reviews like this keep me going!! Thanks again :)

-Tejas

reviews.review_description:
While playing this game I realized how short it was and I think it could use a little more backstory. One thing is the dev could show us all the other sharks like the great white, the whale shark, the tiger sharks etc. Another idea of mine is I think that it would pretty cool if you introduced all the sharks in a coral reef.

Ps: if the dev sees this ty for reading it

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review!! I definitely understand that this game is short, it's sort of like a precursor game to a larger experience.

Although I can't promise any future updates, I appreciate this feedback and your kind words :)

-Tejas

reviews.review_description: I love sharks are this game was very true shark fin soup is so bad and we need to stop is but I love this game

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Thank you so much for leaving a review and trying out our experience! I really appreciate it and I'm so glad you enjoyed it!

-Tejas

reviews.review_description: This game is so weird all you do is identify sharks it’s so lame you should be able to interact with them

developer_response.body: Hey there! First of all, thanks so much for playing and for this review! I love the idea of interacting with sharks, and although I can't promise any future updates, I'll definitely keep this in mind for my future projects!

reviews.review_description: Very unique story which made me really think after playing it. I also really enjoyed the combat mechanic, sneaking up behind people and knocking them out with three hits is really cool and satisfying.

developer_response.body: Hey wafflesnosyrup, thank you SO much for playing and for this review! Your words mean so much, and this type of response just gets me more motivated to create more VR experiences!

reviews.review_description: I loved this game so much. I have been trying to find a game like this forever. Me and my Best friend love the ocean and especially sharks me and my best friend try to find vr shark games on psvr and app lab. Thank you for making our day. We would pay any price for a full game thanks for reading.

developer_response.body:
Wow! First of all, thank you very much for playing! I am so touched by your reaction to this experience, and I'm evaluating for myself how to continue development (I am the only person working on it).

Regardless, thank you very much for your review, and I'm looking forward to creating more VR content for you to enjoy!

-Tejas

reviews.review_description: Lovely experience with a well-constructed atmosphere and touching storyline. Personally I've always had a bit of a phobia about being deep underwater, and so I progressed gingerly thru the opening moments - and ended up enjoying it hugely while losing myself in the immersion. Excellent work.

developer_response.body:
Hi lossless!

Thank you very much for your review! I'm very glad you enjoyed it, and I want to thank you for playing. Take care!

-Tejas

reviews.review_description: This is a beautiful experience I absolutely love how  tranquil serene and beautiful it starts before your main journey starts. The action segments are awesome and exciting too ! Well worth a play and a very relaxing and enjoyable experience overall.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for playing, and I'm so glad you enjoyed the action segments! I wanted the entire project to have emotional variety, and I'm so excited you saw that in the game as well. Thank you!!

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: While playing this game, it was a fun and beat up. The guards was also fun and the climbing mechanics the game should get more updates by releasing the full game. I believe this game has a lot of potential.  🦈🦈🦈

developer_response.body:
Hi kaikaitheone! Thank you so much for your honest review! Although I'm still figuring out how to best move forward with this concept, I really appreciate you playing and giving your feedback!

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: this game not bad......looking 4words to full game

developer_response.body:
Hey NowHere77!
Thanks so much for playing!!! I love how you want more, and although I can't promise anything, I appreciate your comment <3

- Tejas

reviews.review_description: Very blocky with bad hit boxes but I’m all in for improvements

developer_response.body:
Hey josh6810!
Thank you so much for playing! Definitely get that everything is blocky, I originally made this for the Quest 1 (crazy, I know!), so the blockiness is part of fitting the game on low-end hardware.

I love your comment about improvements, and although I can't promise anything, I appreciate your comment :)

- Tejas
